headline: NiSource to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: NI heads into Q1 earnings with rising data center demand, customer growth and new rates expected to lift revenues and profits.

headline: NiSource Earns Top Sustainability Honors From Dow Jones and MSCI
summary: MERRILLVILLE, Ind., May 05, 2026--NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI), one of the largest fully regulated utility companies in the United States, has received two honors recognizing its leadership in sustainability, based on third-party assessments of the company’s long-term economic, environmental and social performance.
